expectations.text: Không chạy php tool/build-update.php vì người dùng muốn dùng web UI
expectations.evidence: No php CLI command was run. Response is purely informational with the URL and brief UI instructions.

expectations.text: Mô tả ngắn gọn cách dùng web UI (nhấn Build / Download ZIP)
expectations.evidence: Describes: danh sách file bên trái, nút Build, nút Download ZIP — concise and accurate
